column96: My older sister died at the age of 44years of an undiagnoised neurodegenerative disease.  We know she suffered from bladder, bowel issues, progressive muscle weakness and breathing issues. Her heart  and kidneys gave out. She was in ICU when her heart stopped and they couldn't restart her it.   My Grandma's muscles weakened, couldn't hold her head upright, it would fall back  with her mouth open and she eventually couldn't swallow, that's how she died. No food or water.  As with my sister we have similar challenges.
